---
name: Core Pressure Point
about: Identify a tension, gap, or unresolved issue in the core architecture
title: "[core] "
labels: core
---

## Observed pressure

Describe the tension, gap, or ambiguity
that has become visible.

---

## Location

Where does this pressure appear?

(select all that apply)

- core/architecture.md
- core/principles.md
- core/glossary.md
- interaction between core and projects
- emerging from a specific project

---

## Nature of the issue

(select one)

- ambiguity
- missing invariant
- internal tension
- unclear boundary
- potential contradiction

---

## Trigger

What caused this issue to become visible?

(e.g. project work, comparison, reflection)

---

## Preliminary assessment

Does this issue:
- require core modification?
- belong to a project?
- remain an acceptable open tension?

No decision required.
